ocr_findings.description: Image is a 2-column layout: left column covers 1章 terms, right column covers 2章 terms (財務/会計 entries). OCR linearizes all entries into a single-column bullet list, losing the 2-column structure. Content appears to be complete but column boundaries are not preserved.
Page header '寝る前10分＆試験直前に効果的！重要用語を総復習！' is present in OCR as a heading. The decorative section-divider icons (colored circles) are absent, which is expected.

reviewer_notes: Image is a 重要用語を総復習 (key-term review) page organized as a dense 2-column bullet list covering chapters 1-2. This is a content/review page rather than a dedicated glossary (索引/用語集 format). Existing label 'glossary' is an approximation; 'content' better reflects the structured-review-within-chapter format. OCR linearizes the 2-column layout but captures all terms.
